scripts.build: node -e "console.log('Static app: no build step required')"
scripts.native:sync: npm run build:native && npx cap sync
scripts.native:add:android: npm run build:native && npx cap add android
scripts.native:add:ios: npm run build:native && npx cap add ios
scripts.native:android: npm run native:sync && npx cap open android
scripts.native:ios: npm run native:sync && npx cap open ios
